_comment: Figure bounding boxes per story section, in panel-image coords (1024x1536, the portrait panel set). Hand-placed against the generated panels — auto face-detection fails on colored-pencil illustrations. preview-score.mjs derives a frame-aspect face box per figure for the in/out face zoom and casts the warm desk-lamp backlight halo from these. [x, y, w, h]. Re-eyeball a box if its panel is regenerated.
